## DomainEvent.(constructor)

Constructs a new instance of the `DomainEvent` class

```typescript
constructor({ detail, bubbles, cancelable, }: {
        detail: TDetail;
        bubbles?: boolean;
        cancelable?: boolean;
    });
```
